title: DAY 10 — CRM-M8 — RMA REPAIR & WARRANTY (DAY 1 OF 2)

questions.question: Which watch components are covered under Sylvi's manufacturer warranty?

options.text: Glass, Strap, Case
Battery, Strap, Movement
Movement, Hands, Dial
Glass, Dial, Hands

questions.question: A customer's watch dial has a manufacturing defect and the watch is 4 months old. The customer has not registered for extended warranty. Which condition applies?

options.text: Condition B — Under Warranty, Not Covered Issue
Condition C — Out of Warranty
Condition D — Certified Imperfect, Mechanical Defect
Condition A — Under Warranty, Covered Issue

questions.question: A customer purchased a watch 9 months ago and registered for extended warranty after delivery. The movement has stopped. What is the coverage status?

options.text: Out of warranty — 9 months exceeds the 6-month manufacturer warranty period
Under warranty — extended warranty covers up to 1 year total from delivery
Condition B — movement is not a covered component
Out of warranty — extended warranty applies only to cosmetic defects

questions.question: A customer's watch has a scratch on the case and water damage. The watch is 2 months old. The customer demands a free repair. What is the correct response?

options.text: Proceed with free repair — the watch is within the 6-month manufacturer warranty
Escalate immediately to CRM Asst Manager before responding
Inform the customer the damage type is not covered; offer chargeable repair with cost estimate
Process as Condition D — Certified Imperfect path applies to all damage

questions.question: A Certified Imperfect watch is submitted for RMA due to a mechanical defect in the movement. What should the executive communicate to the customer after creating the FIMS request?

options.text: "Your product is under warranty and will be repaired free of charge."
"Return or replacement within 10 days is applicable for Certified Imperfect products."
"The mechanical defect is not covered under Certified Imperfect policy — repair will be chargeable."
"Your request has been created. Our team will inspect the product and process accordingly."

questions.question: What is the correct FIMS navigation path to create a new RMA request?

options.text: OMS → Shopify → Returns → Create
OMS → RMA → Orders → Create
OMS → Returns → RMA → New
OMS → RMA → Create

questions.question: When entering order details in FIMS RMA creation (step 7A), the warranty period field is empty. What must the executive enter?

options.text: "12" — the total warranty period including extended warranty is 1 year
Leave it blank — FIMS auto-populates from the order creation date
"6" — the default value per the SOP
Ask the customer for their warranty registration confirmation number

questions.question: A customer purchased their watch on Flipkart and their pincode is serviceable. Which pickup type must be selected in FIMS?

options.text: Free Pickup — pincode serviceability is the only determining factor
Paid Pickup — third-party platform purchases are always chargeable
Self Ship — purchases from platforms other than Sylvi website require self-shipping
Free Pickup — Flipkart customers are eligible for free pickup under warranty

questions.question: In FIMS RMA creation step 7D, "Is Qc Enable Return" is set to Yes. What must the executive do?

options.text: Skip the step — QC is handled by the warehouse team, not CRM
Request the customer to visit a service centre for a physical QC inspection
Upload a QC Image; a screenshot of the customer's video is an acceptable substitute
Upload the customer's original purchase invoice as QC documentation

questions.question: In FIMS, the customer's return address and pickup address are the same, and Free Pickup has been selected. What is the correct sequence of actions?

options.text: Check "Return Address Confirmed" → Click "Pincode Serviceable" → Submit
Click "Pincode Serviceable" → confirm pincode is serviceable → Check "Return Address Confirmed"
Enter the full address manually even when both addresses match
Click Submit directly — no address confirmation is needed if addresses match

questions.question: What is the correct action in step 7F, immediately before clicking Submit in FIMS RMA creation?

options.text: Select the product UID and confirm the issue type
Check "Is Qc Enable Return" and upload the QC image
Confirm/update the customer's contact number, WhatsApp number, and email address
Select the pickup type and enter the address details

questions.question: After the FIMS RMA request is submitted, what is the correct immediate next action?

options.text: Update the RMA tab in Daily Work - CRM-2026.xlsx with all order details
Send the customer the standard repair notification message on WhatsApp
Call the customer to confirm pickup scheduling and estimated arrival
Share the RMA number with the customer on WhatsApp

questions.question: Which column in the RMA tab captures the reverse pickup tracking ID assigned by the courier?

options.text: RMA ID
Reship Tracking
Order Status
Pickup Tracking

questions.question: What are the only valid entries for the "Re-RMA" column in the RMA tab?

options.text: Repeat / First Time
True / False
Yes / No

questions.question: A repair estimate has been shared with the customer but they have not yet provided payment confirmation. Which Repair Status value must be entered in the RMA tab?

options.text: `Start`
`Repair_in_Progress`
`Pending_estimate_approval`
`Payment_Pending`

questions.question: Which column in the RMA tab records the date the warehouse physically confirms receipt of the returned product?

options.text: Delivered Date
Pickup Date
Repair Started
Received Date

questions.question: The product has been packed and is ready to be shipped back to the customer. Which Reship Status value is entered at this stage?

options.text: `Shipped`
`In_transit`
`Ready_to_dispatch`
`Packing`

questions.question: A repair is chargeable (Condition B — warranty, not covered issue). What must be obtained before any FIMS action is taken?

options.text: Customer's verbal confirmation over the phone
CRM Asst Manager sign-off via after-sale-services Slack
Customer's written WhatsApp confirmation after receiving the cost estimate
Customer's explicit confirmation to proceed — written or verbal

questions.question: Which two steps must be completed immediately before proceeding to FIMS RMA creation, regardless of repair type?

options.text: Share RMA number → Update RMA sheet
Video verification → Purchase source check
Customer confirmation (Step 5) → Address verification (Step 6)
Warranty check → Notify customer of outcome

questions.question: A customer's watch is 6 days old and they want a full refund. According to the Decision Guide, which path applies?

options.text: Warranty repair — CRM-M8 RMA process, Condition A
Chargeable repair — 6 days does not fall under the RMA warranty path
Return — per the "Return & Replacement — Standard Operating Procedure"
Re-RMA — the product requires inspection before a refund can be issued
